title: On triangle equivalences of stable categories
author_string: Zhenxing Di, Zhongkui Liu, Jiaqun Wei
journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society of Edinburgh: Section A Mathematics 150 (2020) 955-974
journal_ref: Proceedings of the Royal Society of Edinburgh: Section A Mathematics 150 (2020) 955-974
abstract: We apply the Auslander-Buchweitz approximation theory to show that the Iyama and Yoshino's subfactor triangulated category can be realized as a triangulated quotient. Applications of this realization go in three directions. Firstly, we recover both a result of Iyama and Yang and a result of the third author. Secondly, we extend the classical Buchweitz's triangle equivalence from Iwanaga-Gorenstein rings to Noetherian rings. Finally, we obtain the converse of Buchweitz's triangle equivalence and a result of Beligiannis, and give characterizations for Iwanaga-Gorenstein rings and Gorenstein algebras
